parsed_review.review: Law Firm OS Closeout Pack CP00-082 - Failure Edge Recovery Typed Primary Binding (Claude C00 read-only)
parsed_review.summary: Metadata-only typed/primary failure-edge binding is internally consistent across policy, assembler, validators, fixture, contract, README, and validation script. Counts/ranges align, runtime/write/LDIP boundaries remain false, no P0/P1 issues.

findings.title: New assembler upstream-drift guards may be effectively untested due to redundancy plus loose regex assertions
findings.evidence: Pack-local upstream guards overlapped with assertControlPlaneFailureEdgeRecoveryOpeningResult and loose regex tests.
findings.recommended_action: Add targeted tests or tighten regexes; non-blocking.

findings.title: Nested frozen contract arrays in assembled result not asserted immutable in tests
findings.evidence: Tests asserted result and included_unit_ids freezing but not nested contract arrays/objects.

findings.title: production_ready status on a purely declarative metadata pack convention note
findings.evidence: All 30 subphase closeouts are production_ready while runtime/write flags remain false.
findings.recommended_action: No change required; ensure construction-inspection verifies control_plane_failure_edge_recovery_typed_primary_verified=true.

parsed_review.production_ready_assessment: Acceptable for this gate. production_ready denotes metadata-only contract/planning artifact readiness, not runtime failure recovery.
